name: Moliang Zhou
summary: AI platform leader with 10 years of industrial experience in engineering and applied research. Focused on foundation models, deep learning, and general platform support, connecting cutting-edge AI with pragmatic engineering to turn research into resilient, production-grade platforms while growing talent and fostering a high-standard engineering culture.
